title: Global Markets Chart Pack (Apr 2026 snapshot)
capture_notes:
Direct capture created on 2026-04-05 because pdf-pack overflowed on this specific chart pack. Text was extracted locally with pdfplumber and reviewed by Codex at a high level. No page-by-page chart-number reconstruction was performed.

Direct single-document capture used because the generic pack builder overflowed on this file. Treat numeric chart readings as reviewable until visually checked page by page.
extraction_notes: Primary text came from pdfplumber extraction with light normalisation.
The generic pdf-pack command overflowed on this source, so this bundle was created manually.
No page-by-page manual chart or table reconstruction was performed in this pass.
Model: codex-cli local pdfplumber-assisted direct capture
review_lens: Do not rely on OCR alone. Revisit the source image or nearby text before promoting any chart conclusion.
summary: Power BI Desktop Global Markets Chart Pack This Global Markets Chart Pack is a snapshot of our live, interactive Chart Pack. The latest interactive version can always be viewed on our platform. Our full set of markets forecasts can be found here. The data in this Chart Pack were last updated 1st April 2026.
